attributes.action: Make the conservative Tories pay a compensation scheme for 70mil BREXIT victim
attributes.additional_details: Many household across all races and ethnicities become homeless because of BREXIT after the £ fall, the courts must agree on a set amount the Tories and Reform must agree a small to large compensation scheme  ffrom up to 25-50% of the earnings  for every Tory and Reform that voted BREXIT or possesissions each year for 30 years to make up for the lives lost from BREXIT and stress and psychological damage, financial losses opportunity loses, homes lost, children lied to by Cameron in Jesus Name 😤
attributes.background: The conservative 70% of conservative and Reform forced the country into BREXIT and misled the country about spending too much money on the EU and after leaving the EU the British £ depreciated by a third but 10 years later. Compensation given by their possessions and allowed court ruling now.

rejection.details: We are not clear exactly what you want the Government or Parliament to do. We also do not allow petitions about specific political parties.
